column1: # Sweep — Nano s15 ADAM_WD fine scan + MUON_WD exploration + new-lock validation (2026-04-24)
# CONTEXT: s14b confirmed ADAM_WD=0.050 is the winner (1.7228 seed314, 1.7242 seed42).
# OOM boundary: ADAM_WD >= 0.075 crashes even with expandable_segments:True.
# EMBED_WD at any value OOMs (extra state hits NvMap carveout).
# NEW: Arbiter confirmed MATRIX_LR=0.022 beats 0.040 by 0.028 on Spark (N=3).
#      SCALAR_LR=0.030 beats 0.040 by 0.019 on Spark. Both need cross-machine check.

#   Group C (4 rows): MUON_WD fine scan {0.060, 0.080, 0.100, 0.120}.
#   Group D (1 row):  Safe combo ADAM_WD=0.050 + MUON_WD=0.040.
#   Group E (6 rows): Cross-machine validation of new Spark locks:
# All rows use expandable_segments:True + proven-safe budget.
